title: London City Night Steep Final
subtitle: EGLC 09 · 4.25 NM on 5.5° path · A330 · 01:00 · no reverse
description: An intentionally fictional after-hours A330 arrival into London City. Start fully configured at 2,600 ft MSL, exactly aligned with RWY 09 and the Challenge Lab 5.5° path, in calm clear weather at 01:00 local. The 1,508 m runway must be handled without reverse thrust because of the night-noise restriction. Start/Restart leaves the sim paused after settle — press GO when ready.

reverseThrust.reason: London City night-noise restriction: reverse thrust is prohibited for this after-hours challenge.

hudTips: Start free flight in A330-200 (RR) first — Challenge Lab will not hot-swap aircraft.
After Start/Restart you stay PAUSED at spawn — press GO on the HUD when ready to fly.
Start config: 143 KIAS, gear down, flaps full (index 4), spoilers retracted, parking brake off.
Hold the steep 5.5° RWY 09 path; the spawn is 4.25 NM from threshold at 2,600 ft MSL.
NO REVERSE: any reverser selection fails the rollout gate. Use spoilers and manual wheel braking.
Only 1,508 m is available — touch down accurately and preserve enough runway to stop.
This A330 operation is a fictional simulator challenge, not a real London City procedure.
